---
title: "Professional Projects"
description: "Data science, machine learning, and analytics projects."
listing:
  contents:
    - ../EMAT Signal Processing/index.qmd
    - ../Failed Sensor Scanner/index.qmd
    - ../Healthcare Integrations/index.qmd
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  fields: [image, title, description]
  image-height: 220px
  page-size: 12
---

Projects focused on applied data science, statistical analysis, and machine learning.
